# Lines

Lines represent flexible elements such as risers, umbilicals, and mooring lines.

## Line Types

Line types define the physical properties of a line segment.
See the [Line Types](LineTypes.htm) page for full details.

## Attachments

Lines can be attached to [vessels](Vessels.htm) or fixed points.
